title: ononis pedicellaris
intro: Ononis pedicellaris, also known as the small bird's foot or lesser burnet, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. The medicinal properties of Ononis pedicellaris lie in its root, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. It is said to have anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions. Ononis pedicellaris can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, making it a popular natural remedy for promoting overall health and well-being.
